last_improvement.description: Wired up LLM objectives (expand/defend/economy_bootstrap) to pressure budget computation. Feature was broken - LLM could set objectives but they had no effect. Now functional.
last_improvement.notes: Documented four_score (multi-team format). BLOCKED: No cogames auth token for freeplay submission.

failed_attempts.description: Enhanced LLM prompt with prescriptive anti-stagnation role-change rules
failed_attempts.analysis: Too aggressive role switching disrupted team stability. Prescriptive rules (stalled miner→aligner, stalled aligner→miner) caused excessive role churn. May need softer approach or better stall detection threshold.

failed_attempts.description: Reduced early phase from 30 steps to 15 steps to get 5 aligners faster
failed_attempts.analysis: Ramping too early before economy stabilizes. Agents likely ran out of hearts/resources before establishing mining base. 30-step buffer seems necessary for resource bootstrapping.

baseline_four_score.notes: Self-play baseline with LLM objective fix (001)
